title: Junior Historian
description: Start your journey with your first lesson.

title: Good Start
description: Complete your first 5 history lessons.

title: Small Steps
description: Complete 10 history lessons.

title: Eager Learner
description: Complete 25 history lessons.

title: History Master
description: Complete 50 lessons - A true treasure trove of knowledge!

title: Blood of Lac Hong
description: Complete the entire Founding of the Nation era.

title: Power of Giong
description: Complete the lesson about Saint Giong defeating the An invaders.

title: Magical Crossbow
description: Complete the lesson about the Magical Crossbow of Au Lac.

title: Unbreakable Spirit
description: Complete the entire Northern Domination era.

title: Spirit of the Queens
description: Complete the lesson about the Trung Sisters' uprising.

title: Hero of Bach Dang
description: Complete the lesson about the Battle of Bach Dang in 938.

title: Reed Flag General
description: Complete the lesson about Dinh Bo Linh unifying the country.

title: Witness of Thang Long
description: Complete the lesson about moving the capital to Thang Long.

title: Talented Scholar
description: Complete the lesson about the Temple of Literature (Van Mieu).

title: Dong A Spirit
description: Complete the lesson about the Great Victory of Bach Dang in 1288 against the Mongols.

title: Glorious Era
description: Complete the entire Ly - Tran - Ho eras.

title: Lam Son Warrior
description: Complete the entire Le - Tay Son era.

title: Hero in Common Clothes
description: Complete the lesson about the Great Victory of Ngoc Hoi - Dong Da.

title: Patriotic Flame
description: Complete the Nguyen Dynasty & Anti-French Resistance era.

title: Freedom & Independence
description: Complete the Revolution & Anti-French War era.

title: Dien Bien Fortress
description: Complete the lesson about the Great Victory of Dien Bien Phu.

title: Joy of Reunification
description: Complete the lesson about the Ho Chi Minh Campaign of 1975.

title: A Reunified Land
description: Complete the Resistance War against the US era.

title: Vietnam Rising
description: Complete the Reunification & Renewal era.

title: Meeting a Hero
description: Unlock your first historical hero.

title: History Collector
description: Meet 5 different historical heroes.

title: Roll of Honor
description: Meet 10 national heroes.

title: History Ambassador
description: Meet 15 great national heroes.

title: Master of Origins
description: Complete the Founding Era Arena with a perfect score.

title: Master of Resistance
description: Conquer the Northern Domination Arena - A true feat!

title: Master of Nation-Building
description: Master all knowledge about the Ly - Tran construction period.

title: Lac Hong Wisdom
description: You are so smart! You answered all Quiz questions correctly 3 times in a row!

title: Friend of the Glossary
description: You are very diligent in looking up ancient words to learn more about history.

title: Heritage Collector
description: You have completed 10 different history lessons.

title: Master of Autonomy
description: Master all knowledge about the period of gaining autonomy by the Khuc, Duong, and Ngo families.

title: Master of Prosperity
description: Conquer all knowledge about the powerful Early Le and Tay Son periods.

title: Master of Resilience
description: Understand clearly about the resilient struggle of our people during the Nguyen and anti-French periods.

title: Master of Patriotism
description: Master the patriotic movements of the early 20th century and Uncle Ho's journey.

title: Master of Independence
description: Master knowledge about the August Revolution and the long anti-French resistance.

title: Master of Reunification
description: Conquer all challenges regarding the resistance war against the US to save the country.

title: Master of Renewal
description: Master knowledge about Vietnam during the period of unification and modern development.
